summary: Telegram bug reporter accepts telegram-bug-reporter.env as a local secret config fallback and successfully sent a smoke-test message to the configured group.
derived_updates: The Telegram reporter CLI now reads both telegram-bug-reporter.local.env and telegram-bug-reporter.env without exposing token contents.
The Telegram MCP status now reports the active config candidate while keeping send operations gated.
A live smoke-send succeeded with sent=true and Telegram message_id=20042.
